nodes.full_name: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act
nodes.name: HIPAA
nodes.description: The federal framework setting standards for protecting sensitive patient health information. This modernized version includes the HITECH Act, 2013 Omnibus Rule, 2024 Reproductive Health Care Privacy Rule, and 2026 42 CFR Part 2 (SUD) alignments.

Defines breach assessment and reporting requirements
Establishes investigations penalties and compliance procedures
